summary: Removed timing-sensitive split ownership for main open-position counts by stopping renderState() from writing kpi-open/cmd-open.
Main open-position counts now derive only from the canonical openPaperPositions array in renderUnifiedPositions().
Improved active-card scanability with clearer matchup/source/stale-price presentation while preserving truthfulness.
Made the 0-open state intentional and explicit that shadow/advisory remains diagnostics only.

report.exact_source_used_for_all_main_open_posi: openPaperPositions built from /api/trades open paper trades only, via buildOpenPaperPositions(trades, shadowRecs)
card_usability_improvements: matchup shown as a dedicated top line
source made clearer with source chip
stale current-price condition surfaced as 'market price unavailable' plus 'Current (stale)' label
empty state rewritten to clearly indicate no live paper positions while shadow remains diagnostics

notes: Scope remained limited to dashboard.html only.
No truth regression introduced; shadow remains secondary and main cards remain paper-trade-only.
